root_text.an7.92:1.3: Sakkāyadiṭṭhi ārakā hoti, vicikicchā ārakā hoti, sīlabbataparāmāso ārako hoti, rāgo ārako hoti, doso ārako hoti, moho ārako hoti, māno ārako hoti.
root_text.an7.92:1.4: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, sattannaṁ dhammānaṁ ārakattā arahā hotī”ti.

translation_text.an7.92:1.1: “Mendicants, it’s by being impeccably remote from seven things that you become a perfected one.
translation_text.an7.92:1.3: Substantialist view, doubt, misapprehension of precepts and observances, greed, hate, delusion, and conceit.
translation_text.an7.92:1.4: It’s because of being impeccably remote from these seven things that you become a perfected one.”
